Defendants Motion To Change Venue
Off Calendar Dec-02-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT RUSSELL GRASSI'S Motion To Change Venue.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. The motion is granted. No opposition filed.

Counsel for the defendants is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
